stations.source: public station stream metadata
stations.notes: Radio Browser checked entry: KTNN 660 AM, the Voice of the Navajo Nation. BASS live smoke OK 2026-07-14. Desert Southwest sweep. Widest contour in the catalog on purpose: a 50 kW clear-channel AM groundwave really does cover most of the Four Corners by day, unlike any FM.
